narrative_role: Apertura assoluta. Stabilisce mondo, tono, palette.

prompt_components.subject: an antique wooden sailing ship with cream-white sails and dark wood hull
prompt_components.action: gliding smoothly through calm dawn ocean waters, no people visible on deck
prompt_components.environment: open sea at dawn, soft mist on the horizon, pastel sky transitioning from pale pink to cream white, no land visible
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow crane down from the sky to the ship's bow, ending on a static framing of the prow cutting through water
prompt_components.lighting: golden hour light from low east, long warm shadows on the sails, atmospheric haze over horizon
prompt_components.mood: contemplative, mythic, the beginning of an unknown journey
prompt_components.audio_hint: soft ocean waves lapping against the hull, distant seagulls, gentle wind through sails, low ambient hum

assembled_prompt_preview: Vedi outputs/scene_01_prompt_for_gemini.txt per la versione expanded copy-paste ready (STYLE_DNA e NEGATIVE_PROMPT inseriti). Conservato qui in forma compatta per leggibilità: 'Wide cinematic shot of an antique wooden sailing ship with cream-white sails and dark wood hull gliding smoothly through calm dawn ocean waters, no people visible on deck. ... [+STYLE_DNA da 00_style_bible.md] [+NEGATIVE_PROMPT da 00_style_bible.md]'
acceptance_criteria: Sfondo cream white #F5EFE6 chiaramente visibile in cielo e foschia
Nessun arancione nella scena (non è ancora il momento narrativo)
Movimento di camera fluido, non shaky
Audio Veo include onde, gabbiani, vento
